mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_product_list
select IFNULL(sum(volume), 0) + IFNULL(sum(real_volume),0) from lkt_product_list

SELECT count(distinct a.id) FROM lkt_product_list AS a RIGHT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.id = c.pid LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON a.mch_id = m.id LEFT JOIN lkt_brand_class AS brand ON brand.brand_id = a.brand_id and brand.recycle=0
SELECT count(distinct a.id) FROM lkt_product_list AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS b ON a.mch_id = b.id
SELECT count(distinct a.id) FROM lkt_product_list AS a RIGHT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.id = c.pid LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON a.mch_id = m.id
SELECT count(1) FROM lkt_product_list AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS b ON a.mch_id = b.id
SELECT count(1) FROM lkt_product_list AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.id = c.pid and c.recycle=0

SELECT f.NAME, f.freight, f.type, f.default_freight, f.supplier_id, p.mch_id, p.weight, count(p.id) as pNum FROM lkt_product_list AS p LEFT JOIN lkt_freight AS f ON p.freight = f.id WHERE p.id = #{p_id}

where.trim:
AND a.store_id = #{storeId} AND a.recycle = 0 AND a.is_presell = 0 AND a.mch_status = 2 AND (a.product_title like CONCAT('%',#{condition},'%') or a.id = #{condition} or b.supplier_name like CONCAT('%',#{condition},'%')) AND a.STATUS = #{status} AND a.mch_id = #{mch_id} AND a.supplier_superior is not null
AND a.mch_id = 0 AND a.status not in (4,5) AND a.id NOT IN (SELECT x.supplier_superior FROM lkt_product_list x WHERE x.store_id = #{storeId} AND x.mch_id = #{mchId} AND x.recycle = 0 AND x.supplier_superior is not null order by a.add_date ${date_sort})
AND a.product_class like CONCAT('%-',#{product_class},'-%')
AND a.brand_id = #{brand_id} AND a.product_title like CONCAT('%',#{product_title},'%')

mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM lkt_product_list AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_supplier b on a.gongyingshang = b.id

SELECT ifnull(count(1), 0) num,b.product_class class from lkt_configure a LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list b on a.pid=b.id
b.gongyingshang!='' and a.recycle = 0 and b.recycle = 0
and b.store_id=#{storeid}
GROUP BY b.product_class

select count(1) AS total FROM ( SELECT c.pid FROM lkt_product_list AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.id = c.pid LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON a.mch_id = m.id LEFT JOIN lkt_distribution_goods d ON d.p_id = a.id AND d.uplevel = 0 AND d.recycle = 0
GROUP BY c.pid) as countProductAndDistribution
SELECT * FROM lkt_product_list WHERE write_off_mch_ids IS NOT NULL AND mch_id = #{mch_id} AND store_id =#{store_id} AND commodity_type = 1
SELECT count(1) FROM lkt_configure c LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS a ON a.id = c.pid AND a.recycle = 0 AND c.recycle = 0 LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS b ON a.mch_id = b.id

SELECT a.id,c.num AS stock_num,c.id as attrId,c.attribute,a.product_title,a.imgurl,a.brand_id,c.price,b.`name` FROM lkt_configure c LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS a ON a.id = c.pid AND a.recycle = 0 AND c.recycle = 0 LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS b ON a.mch_id = b.id
LIMIT #{page},#{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(1) AS num FROM ( SELECT c.attribute, t.group_count -- 从分组统计结果中获取计数值 FROM lkt_configure c LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list a ON a.id = c.pid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pid, COUNT(*) AS group_count FROM lkt_configure GROUP BY pid ) t ON c.pid = t.pid -- 通过子查询计算分组计数 WHERE a.store_id = #{storeId} AND a.mch_id = #{mchId} AND a.mch_status = 2 AND a.recycle = 0 ) tmp WHERE (group_count = 1 AND attribute = 'a:1:{s:15:"默认_LKT_3402";s:15:"默认_LKT_3403";}') OR (group_count > 1 AND attribute != 'a:1:{s:15:"默认_LKT_3402";s:15:"默认_LKT_3403";}');

SELECT COUNT(1) AS num FROM ( SELECT c.attribute, t.group_count -- 从分组统计结果中获取计数值 FROM lkt_configure c LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list a ON a.id = c.pid LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pid, COUNT(*) AS group_count FROM lkt_configure GROUP BY pid ) t ON c.pid = t.pid -- 通过子查询计算分组计数 WHERE a.store_id = #{storeId} AND a.mch_id = #{mchId} AND a.mch_status = 2 AND a.status = 2 AND a.recycle = 0 ) tmp WHERE (group_count = 1 AND attribute = 'a:1:{s:15:"默认_LKT_3402";s:15:"默认_LKT_3403";}') OR (group_count > 1 AND attribute != 'a:1:{s:15:"默认_LKT_3402";s:15:"默认_LKT_3403";}');

SELECT a.id, a.product_title, a.subtitle, a.imgurl, a.volume, a.price, a.yprice FROM (SELECT a.id, a.product_title, a.subtitle, a.imgurl, a.volume, min(c.price) over(partition by c.pid) AS price, c.yprice, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by c.pid) AS top FROM lkt_product_list AS a RIGHT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON a.id = c.pid WHERE a.store_id = #{storeId} AND a.STATUS = 2 AND a.mch_status = 2 AND a.recycle = 0 AND a.active = 6 ORDER BY a.sort DESC, a.add_date DESC) AS a WHERE a.top = 1 limit #{pageModel.pageNo} , #{pageModel.pageSize}
